Bash(ssh -A -J ec2-user@75.101.208.163 ec2-user@10.50.10.229 "set -e; cd /opt/mda-dashboard; echo '=== Pull new image ==='; sudo /home/ec2-user/ecr-login.sh 2>&1 | tail -1; sudo docker compose pull 2>&1 | tail -5; echo; echo '=== Restart ==='; sudo docker compose up -d --force-recreate 2>&1 | tail -8; echo; sleep 12; echo '=== Status ==='; sudo docker compose ps; echo; echo '=== Recent logs ==='; sudo docker compose logs --tail=15 api 2>&1 | tail -20")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=$\(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id mda-dashboard/rds-master-password --query SecretString --output text\) psql "host=localhost port=25432 user=postgres_admin dbname=geospatial_tracking_system sslmode=require" -c "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM mda_households\) AS hh, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM mda_individuals\) AS ind, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM lgas\) AS lgas, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM wards\) AS wards, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM settlements\) AS settlements, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM grids\) AS grids;")
